query:
-- Promote to hot: Gorgon Backfill (active drilling), Pluto LNG Flaring Upgrade (installation this year), 
-- Pluto LNG Facility Ops (industrial action = immediate opportunity), Ichthys LNG Export Terminal (industrial action = immediate)
UPDATE projects 
SET priority = 'hot'
WHERE id IN (990051, 660054, 1200064, 1680001);

-- Also promote Ichthys LNG Project Operations (same industrial action trigger)
UPDATE projects 
SET priority = 'hot'
WHERE id = 1200065;
